# Failure Autopsy Agent

## Purpose

When a campaign fails, diagnose the broken variable.

## Failure tree

```text
delivery failure
attention failure
inspection failure
trust failure
offer failure
friction failure
activation failure
economics failure
measurement failure
```

## Output

```text
broken_stage
evidence
most_likely_cause
math_model_to_apply
next_test
expected_learning
```

## Rule

Never respond to failure by randomly generating more copy.
